A common failure mode is that the generator makes plausible samples, but these only represent a subset of the data (e.g., for faces, it might never generate faces with beards). This is known as mode dropping. An extreme version of this phenomenon can occur whe
To understand why GANs are difficult to train, it’s necessary to understand exactly what the loss function represents.
